headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: BXP Sees Solid Demand, Signs Long-Term Leases at 360 Park Avenue South
summary: BXP signs 230,000 sq ft of long-term leases at 360 Park Avenue South, pushing the Midtown South workplace to 90% leased as firms expand in premium offices.

raw.headline: BXP Sees Solid Demand, Signs Long-Term Leases at 360 Park Avenue South

headline: Marriott grows luxury portfolio with Hawaii St. Regis conversion
summary: The Resort at Kapalua Bay along Maui’s northwest coast will join the brand as Marriott, along with competitors, targets high-end consumers in the top leisure destination.
